packets.name: Voice client-side tool calls
packets.write_scope: server.ts, src/components/ChatPanel.tsx, src/store/index.ts, src/lib/voiceAgentTools.ts, package.json, tests/voice-agent-tools.test.mjs, .workflow/brain-architecture-implementation-program/*, graphify-out/*

checks: Graphify routed the slice through ChatPanel, server voice websocket settings, store voice events, and the new voiceAgentTools helper
Older tutor-debug brain runner hooks were checked but current package.json has no brain:* scripts, so the phase used Graphify plus standard repo gates
Added client-side Deepgram voice tools for look_at_study_context, update_graph, and generate_flashcards
Server voice Settings now advertises the local tool definitions and logs FunctionCallRequest/FunctionCallResponse activity in the system ledger
ChatPanel now handles FunctionCallRequest, executes local study-context retrieval, graph updates, and flashcard persistence, responds with FunctionCallResponse, and records voice tool jobs
Generated voice flashcards write the existing flashcard/artifact provenance ledgers and mark the voice session message as having flashcards
npm run test passed, 88 tests including voice-agent tool contract tests
In-app Browser QA on http://localhost:3100 confirmed Admin still exposes voice/tool/memory/retrieval surfaces and mobile Tutor still exposes textbox, Start voice input, and Send message
Browser warning/error logs were empty during smoke QA
Live Deepgram voice was not exercised in this phase to keep verification local and avoid external provider dependency
graphify update . --force regenerated graphify-out with 870 nodes, 1466 edges, and 60 communities
Graphify smoke query and artifact grep confirmed the refreshed graph includes voiceAgentTools, VOICE_AGENT_TOOL_DEFINITIONS, parseVoiceFunctionArguments(), and buildVoiceFunctionCallResponse()
Temporary local dev server on port 3100 was used only for verification
